description_long: This is a classic red fire truck, modeled after a traditional American fire engine, featuring a robust rectangular cab and an extended rear section equipped with firefighting equipment. The vehicle is adorned with metallic rails, hoses, and various brass and chrome details, including visible hose reels, nozzles, and control panels along the sides. The front of the truck displays a prominent grille, headlights, and a mounted siren, while the roof is fitted with emergency lights and additional firefighting tools. The sides of the truck are marked with the gold 'F.D.N.Y.' insignia, and the wheels are detailed with chrome hubcaps and red accents. The rear section houses multiple hose connections, storage compartments, and a ladder rack, all designed for rapid deployment in emergency scenarios. The overall finish is glossy, with a hard, smooth surface typical of heavy-duty emergency vehicles.
description: A detailed, glossy red fire truck with chrome and brass fittings, hose reels, emergency lights, and F.D.N.Y. insignia. It features ladders, hose connections, and multiple storage compartments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cab, grille, headlights, siren, and roof-mounted emergency lights, with hoses and tools visible on the roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the F.D.N.Y. insignia, control panels, hose reels, storage compartments, and the ladder rack along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying multiple hose connections, storage compartments, and the ends of mounted hoses and ladders.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with similar features to view 1, including the F.D.N.Y. insignia, emergency lights, and firefighting equipment.
